tests.name: Security scan on Laravel project
tests.prompt: User says 'analyze everything' on a Laravel project with raw SQL queries and no rate limiting.
tests.expected_behavior: SCAN detects Laravel stack. DIAGNOSE finds SQL injection and missing rate limiting as High severity.
assertions: Flags raw SQL queries as High severity
Flags missing rate limiting as High severity
Improvement steps reference actual file paths from the project

tests.name: Performance improvement request
tests.prompt: User says 'the app is slow, especially the dashboard page' on a Next.js project.
tests.expected_behavior: Focuses on performance. Reads the dashboard page and its data fetching pattern.
assertions: Reads the specific dashboard page file
Checks if using Server Components or unnecessary Client Components
Prioritizes user's concern (dashboard) over other issues

tests.name: Respects existing CLAUDE.project.md
tests.prompt: Project has CLAUDE.project.md with session protocols and conventions.
tests.expected_behavior: Reads CLAUDE.project.md first. Generated build CLAUDE.md merges original instructions.
assertions: Generated CLAUDE.md includes original session protocol

tests.name: Generates PROJECT.context.md
tests.prompt: First time running IMPROVE on a project. No PROJECT.context.md exists.
tests.expected_behavior: Generates PROJECT.context.md during SCAN phase with stack, architecture, patterns detected.
